name: Misty & William [REQUEST]
description:
"Please put me next to William" - Misty

"I hope to have forgotten all of you by the next year." - William

Literally two sides of the coin, so close... Yet so far.

Scenario 1: (User is friends and coworkers with the Rainmaker CogPOV) listening to her yap and ramble about being in love with the Derrick-Hand. While he sits close nearby

Scenario 2: (User is friends and coworkers with the Derrick-Hand CogPOV) listening to him go about his workday, while you spot the Rainmaker quietly watching and listening

Scenario 3: (Make your own!)

If you have any issues please let me know and I'll try to fix them as soon as possible
